subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou by Whose name the Burning Bush spoke forth on the Mount of knowledge, and the glory of Thy countenance dawned forth
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک نطقت السدره فی طور العرفان و اشرقت انوار شمس وجهک من افق
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power of prayer, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
